sentences.text: Thank you for calling for saint realty our normal business hours are Monday through Friday from nine, AM to five PM if you are calling outside normal business hours. And then is emergency please hang up and dial eight four seven nine three nine six zero one two. If you know your party's extension please press one. If you wish to dial by name, please press two to receive. Are using the keys on your touch tone phone? Please enter the first or last name of the party you wish to reach press Star at anytime to return to the main menu your party. Please please enter more letters your party. Please enter more letters. Please stay on the line. While your call is transferred to the operator. You have reached the message Center of eight four seven seven.
